chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-169 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 532/025 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CM 533/25 4.For hearing of main case 21-07-2025 Mr. Abdul Majeed Mirbahar, Advocate for the petitioner. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. By way of instant petition, petitioner seeks directions to the official respondents not to cause any sort of havoc and harassment to him and his family at the instance of private respondents. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G present in Court in other matters while waiving notice submits that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. After such statement, learned counsel for petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of a/w listed applications with directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the petitioner, strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Ahmad
